title: Chicken Salt
description: Adds chicken salt, yep that's literally it
body:
Adds the best food source to the game, chicken salt.

![Crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2aa0f62e797c3ce737b64412e4aab8447d4230dd.png)

_Also don't add this if you don't want a super overpowered food source, you can easily craft this and it has sped up eating time_

Made this with MCreator in like 5 mins
